name: Super Defense Robot Lio
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＳＤ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スーパーディフェンス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ロボ・ライオ
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Super Defense Robot" monster or "Orbital 7" from your hand. Once per turn, when exactly 1 "Super Defense Robot" monster or "Orbital 7" (and no other cards) is added from your Graveyard to your hand (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon it from your hand.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Super Defense Robot" monster or "Orbital 7" from your hand. Once per turn, when exactly 1 "Super Defense Robot" monster or "Orbital 7" (and no other cards) is added from your Graveyard to your hand (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon it from your hand.
